events.notes: cross-domain transfer regression after embedder swap

articles.title: A calibrated narrow claim beats a confident broad one
Adversarial review surfaces the buried assumption

drafted.text: Cross-domain coherence beats single-domain depth when the firm must commit under uncertainty.
Adversarial review precedes friendly review; the friendly read leaves load-bearing assumptions buried.

findings.reason: Self-critique on 'A calibrated narrow claim beats a confident broad one' — verdict: weakened. The supporting forecast resolved YES, but the claim's narrowing was tighter than the resolved bucket licensed.

Self-critique on 'Adversarial review surfaces the buried assumption' — verdict: scope-overreach. The supporting evidence covered methodology and forecasting, not all transfer targets the article implied.

narrative.overview: The firm closed 2026 Q2 with 4 active method(s), 1 deprecated, and 1 retired. 2 drift event(s) entered the ledger; 4 forecast(s) resolved. The firm published 2 article(s) and the self-critique pass surfaced 2 finding(s).
narrative.methods: The register carries 4 active method(s) at quarter close. The firm marked 1 method(s) deprecated and retired 1. Retirement is the firm's standing acknowledgement that a method no longer earns its place in the register.
narrative.drift: The firm observed 2 drift event(s) in window. The highest-scoring event was against target m_geometry at score 0.420; the firm treats the score as evidence of a regime shift to be investigated, not an automatic retirement trigger.
narrative.calibration: Across 4 resolved forecast(s), the firm posted a mean Brier of 0.138, and mean log-loss 0.340. The firm reads the score as a calibration check, not a performance leaderboard.
narrative.open_questions: Open-questions data was not available this quarter — the firm has no per-window resolved/added feed yet and refuses to estimate it.
narrative.articles: The firm published 2 article(s) in the quarter. Each carries the machine-drafted, founder-reviewed disclosure non-removably; the firm speaks as the firm, never as a single voice.
narrative.principles: The firm distilled 2 principle(s) in the quarter; the strongest reached conviction 0.74 across 3 domain(s). Conviction earns its place in the register; the firm does not auto-promote a draft.
narrative.edited_conclusions: No conclusions were edited in window. The firm records the absence; an edit-light quarter is evidence, not silence.
narrative.self_critique: The self-critique pass surfaced 2 finding(s) the firm got wrong this quarter. Each finding is named — the firm does not soften a self-critique.
